specialAttack.description: Snapshot: Fires two arrows in rapid succession, each dealing up to 75% of your normal max hit.
Energy Drain: Lashes at the target — if it connects, the creature is stunned for one attack cycle, skipping its next hit.
Puncture: Strikes twice in rapid succession, each hit capable of dealing up to 115% of your normal max hit.
Sever: A precise strike that completely bypasses the target's defences, rolling against zero defence.
Warstrike: A crushing blow that deals damage and permanently weakens the target's defences for the rest of the fight by the amount of damage dealt.
The Judgement: A devastating strike rolled at 125% accuracy and capable of hitting up to 125% of your normal max damage.
Healing Blade: Strikes with divine power, restoring your HP by half the damage dealt (minimum 10 HP healed).
Ice Cleave: Strikes with chaotic energy, dealing damage and freezing the target for ~20 seconds (33 ticks), preventing it from attacking.
Saradomin's Lightning: A two-hit attack — a melee strike followed by a divine lightning bolt dealing 1–16 magic damage (always hits).
Pebble Shot: Fires a bolt that never misses, dealing up to 125% of your normal ranged max hit.
Shove: A powerful stab rolled at 175% accuracy that staggers the target, skipping their next 2 attacks.
Toxic Siphon: Guaranteed hit at 150% max hit. Heals you for half the damage dealt.
The Block: Slam your bulwark with unstoppable force — guaranteed 40–64 damage. No accuracy roll. Cannot be blocked.
Slice and Dice: Four rapid slashes — each hit is half the previous. Exceptional burst damage.
